title: Amtech L0870 4 Piece Screwdriver Set
features: VERSATILE: This screwdriver set contains 2 slotted (3 x 60mm, 3 x 75mm) and 2 Phillips screwdrivers (#1 x 60mm, #1 x 75mm)
EASY TO USE: They have comfortable moulded handles with plastic blade protection for ease of use
PLEASE NOTE: They are not suitable for electrical wiring use
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: [General screw driving tasks, DIY projects, Home maintenance, Light assembly work]
